summary: 5 of 8 results trigger hits, including two direct twins (ranks 7 and 8) with sem>=0.92 and func>=0.90 covering both the large-N micro-aperture encoders and the global pigmentation gain mask. Multi-cluster matches plus the direct brittle-star-inspired encoder paper indicate the SKELETON-VIS candidate is not novel.
